changes.value:
## What

Move `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/perspective/context.rs` to `swissarmyhammer-perspectives/src/context.rs`.

**Changes needed:**
- Replace all `KanbanError` references with `PerspectiveError`
- Replace `KanbanError::not_found(...)` → `PerspectiveError::not_found(...)`
- Replace `KanbanError::duplicate_name(...)` → `PerspectiveError::duplicate_name(...)`
- Replace `KanbanError::Io(...)` → `PerspectiveError::Io(...)`
- Update imports to use `crate::error::{PerspectiveError, Result}`
- Update imports to use `crate::types::Perspective`

Move all context unit tests along.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `perspectives/src/context.rs` compiles with PerspectiveError
- [ ] All context tests pass in new crate
- [ ] No references to `swissarmyhammer_kanban` remain

## Tests
- [ ] All existing context tests pass in new location
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-perspectives perspective context`
EXTRACT-3: Move context.rs to new crate
